response:
TEMPERATURE IS A MEASURE OF HEAT.
SUN SHINES SO BRIGHTLY ON US.
STARS SHINE IN THE SKY ABOVE.
SEAS SURGE WITH SALTY SPRAY.
SNOW STICKS TO THE COLD GROUND.
SPRINGS SOAK UP THE RAIN.
SUMMER SWELLS WITH SUNLIGHT.
STORMS SWEEP ACROSS THE LAND.
SILENT SNOWFALL SLOWS THE WIND.
SUNSET STREAKS THE SKY RED.
SOFT BREEZES SWAY THE TREES.
ROLL THE DICE NOW.
